name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after work injury in Idaho?
description: 1 year to file in Idaho, report employer in 60 days.[2]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a workers comp claim after work injury in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1 year to file in Idaho, report employer in 60 days.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: You have one year from the injury date to file a workers' comp claim in Idaho, but report to employer within 60 days to avoid disputes. Missing deadlines bars benefits.[2] Key factors: date of accident or disability onset starts clock; minors/dependent extensions rare; government employers may have shorter notices. Mark calendar, submit formal application to Idaho Industrial Commission; get help if symptoms delayed. Early filing secures medical and indemnity payments promptly.
